mapper.select:
/* clsAcntCloseMgmtMapper.getDlyAddAmtList */
SELECT Y.ORGN_ID , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS SALE_DT , 1 AS SALE_CNT , Y.DELAY_ADD_AMT AS SALE_AMT , 0 AS VAT FROM ( SELECT X.ORGN_ID , TRUNC(SYSDATE - LAST_DAY(TO_DATE(X.CLS_ACNT_YM, 'YYYYMM'))) * X.UNPAY_AMT * ( X.RATE / 100 ) / 365 AS DELAY_ADD_AMT FROM ( SELECT A.ORGN_ID , A.CLS_ACNT_YM , SUM(A.CLS_ACNT_TRGT_AMT - A.CLS_ACNT_PROC_AMT - A.DPST_PROC_AMT) AS UNPAY_AMT , NVL(B.RATE, C.RATE) AS RATE FROM CLS_ACNT_DTL A , CLS_DSCNT_EXCHRG_INFO B , CLS_DSCNT_EXCHRG_INFO C WHERE A.CLS_ACNT_YM < #{CLS_ACNT_YM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.CLS_ACNT_TRGT_AMT <> A.CLS_ACNT_PROC_AMT + A.DPST_PROC_AMT AND A.CLS_ACNT_ITM_CD = 'CA10' AND A.ORGN_ID = B.ORGN_ID(+) AND B.SCTN_CD(+) = '20' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN B.APPL_STRT_DT(+) AND B.APPL_END_DT(+) AND C.ORGN_ID = '0000000000' AND C.SCTN_CD = '20' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN C.APPL_STRT_DT AND C.APPL_END_DT GROUP BY A.ORGN_ID, A.CLS_ACNT_YM, NVL(B.RATE, C.RATE) ) X ) Y WHERE Y.DELAY_ADD_AMT > 0
mapper.insert:
/* SchdMgmtMapper.setStockCompensationList */ INSERT INTO CLS_STCK_CMPST_INFO ( MAKE_DT , ORGN_ID , PRDT_ID , OLD_YN , PRDT_SRL_NUM , CMPST_AMT , CMPST_VAT , REGST_ID , REG_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT #{PROC_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , C.ORGN_ID , C.PRDT_ID , A.OLD_YN , C.PRDT_SRL_NUM , (A.OUT_UNIT_PRIC - B.OUT_UNIT_PRIC) AS CMPST_AMT /* 출고가차액 */ , (A.OUT_UNIT_PRIC - B.OUT_UNIT_PRIC) * D.ETC1 AS CMPST_VAT /* 부가세 */ , #{USER_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , SYSDATE , #{USER_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , SYSDATE FROM CMN_HNDST_AMT A , CMN_HNDST_AMT B , ( SELECT A.ORGN_ID , A.RPRS_PRDT_ID , A.PRDT_ID , A.OLD_YN , A.PRDT_SRL_NUM FROM LGS_PRDT_SRL_MST A , ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST B WHERE A.LOGIS_PROC_STAT_CD LIKE 'Z11%' AND A.ORGN_ID = B.ORGN_ID AND B.TYPE_CD = '20' ) C , CMN_GRP_CD_MST D WHERE A.UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM = '99991231235959' AND A.UNIT_PRIC_APPL_DTTM = #{PROC_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '000000' AND A.RPRS_PRDT_ID = B.RPRS_PRDT_ID AND A.OLD_YN = B.OLD_YN AND B.UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM = TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{PROC_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYYMMDD') - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') || '235959'
AND A.OUT_UNIT_PRIC <> B.OUT_UNIT_PRIC AND A.RPRS_PRDT_ID = C.RPRS_PRDT_ID AND A.OLD_YN = C.OLD_YN AND D.GRP_ID = 'CLS0038' AND D.CD_VAL = '20'
mapper.select: /* SchdMgmtMapper.getStockCompensationList */ SELECT A.MAKE_DT AS SALE_DT , A.ORGN_ID , A.PRDT_ID , COUNT(*) AS SALE_CNT , SUM(A.CMPST_AMT) AS SALE_AMT , SUM(A.CMPST_VAT) AS VAT , SUM(A.CMPST_AMT + A.CMPST_VAT) * -1 AS CRDT_RVL_AMT FROM CLS_STCK_CMPST_INFO A WHERE MAKE_DT = #{PROC_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY A.MAKE_DT, A.ORGN_ID, A.PRDT_ID
